title: API Observability & Golden Signals
description: Architect API observability solutions by implementing OpenTelemetry tracing for the full request lifecycle. Design custom dashboards to monitor API Golden Signals: Latency, Traffic, Errors, and Saturation.
objectives: Architect API observability solutions by implementing OpenTelemetry tracing for the full request lifecycle.
Design custom dashboards to monitor API Golden Signals: Latency, Traffic, Errors, and Saturation.
